outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to lack of structural OI barriers, prone to drift.
outlook.summary: Market shows neutral sentiment with zero Open Interest across all expiries. Heavy speculative volume is concentrated at ITM Call strikes, primarily 6700 and 6710. Spot is trading significantly above all provided strikes and the Gamma Flip level, indicating a purely flow-driven intraday environment.

levels.motivazione: Highest volume concentration across all three expirations (0DTE, WEEKLY, MONTHLY). Acts as a gravitational pull for speculative ITM Call flow and serves as the primary structural reference point.
Notable volume confluence between 0DTE and MONTHLY expirations, representing a secondary friction cluster where speculative intraday positioning occurs.
Heavy 0DTE speculative volume (268) at this strike providing a minor intraday attraction level for fast money flow.
Structural gamma equilibrium point. Currently far below the spot price, minimizing its immediate intraday hedging impact.
